title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at IBM India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at IBM India
jsonLd.description:
IBM India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!
